--- title: "Commodity drivers" --- ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(dplyr) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Attaching package: 'dplyr' ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': filter, lag ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following objects are masked from 'package:base': intersect, setdiff, setequal, union ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} library(readr) library(tidyr) library(ggplot2) library(scales) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Attaching package: 'scales' ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following object is masked from 'package:readr': col_factor ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} library(DT) dir_diag <- "~/Symobio/Data/Processed/BF_NEE_Diagnostics" dir_bf <- "~/Symobio/Data/Processed/BF_NEE_Countries" valid <- read_csv( file.path(dir_diag, "bfnee_valid_countries.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE ) valid_iso3 <- valid %>% filter(valid_for_analysis) %>% pull(iso3) ``` ::: # Load commodity-level BF-NEE ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} read_commodity_bf <- function(iso3) { iso3_lower <- tolower(iso3) dir_country <- file.path(dir_bf, iso3) files <- list.files( dir_country, pattern = paste0("^BF_NEE_by_commodity_", iso3_lower, "_.*\\.csv$"), full.names = TRUE ) if (length(files) == 0) { return(NULL) } bind_rows(lapply(files, function(f) { x <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) x$source_file <- basename(f) x })) } commodity_raw <- bind_rows( lapply(valid_iso3, read_commodity_bf) ) commodity_bf <- commodity_raw %>% filter(!is.na(BF_NEE_commodity)) ``` ::: # Global commodity contributions ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} commodity_global <- commodity_bf %>% group_by(year, transition, commodity) %>% summarise( bfnee_km2 = sum(BF_NEE_commodity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop" ) commodity_global_total <- commodity_global %>% group_by(year, transition) %>% summarise( global_bfnee_km2 = sum(bfnee_km2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop" ) commodity_global <- commodity_global %>% left_join( commodity_global_total, by = c("year", "transition") ) %>% mutate( share_global_bfnee = bfnee_km2 / global_bfnee_km2 ) ``` ::: # Top commodities by period ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} top_commodities_by_period <- commodity_global %>% group_by(year, transition) %>% slice_max(bfnee_km2, n = 15, with_ties = FALSE) %>% ungroup() ggplot( top_commodities_by_period, aes( x = reorder(commodity, bfnee_km2), y = bfnee_km2 ) ) + geom_col() + coord_flip() + facet_wrap(~ transition, scales = "free_y") + scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) + labs( title = "Top commodities by BF-NEE and transition", subtitle = "Validated countries only", x = "Commodity", y = "BF-NEE (km²)" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](04_commodity_drivers_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Top commodities in latest period ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} latest_year <- max(commodity_global$year, na.rm = TRUE) top_latest <- commodity_global %>% filter(year == latest_year) %>% arrange(desc(bfnee_km2)) %>% slice_head(n = 20) ggplot( top_latest, aes( x = reorder(commodity, bfnee_km2), y = bfnee_km2 ) ) + geom_col() + coord_flip() + scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) + labs( title = paste("Top commodities in", latest_year), subtitle = "Validated countries only", x = "Commodity", y = "BF-NEE (km²)" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](04_commodity_drivers_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Commodity shares of global BF-NEE ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggplot( top_latest, aes( x = reorder(commodity, share_global_bfnee), y = share_global_bfnee ) ) + geom_col() + coord_flip() + scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) + labs( title = paste("Commodity share of global BF-NEE in", latest_year), subtitle = "Top 20 commodities, validated countries only", x = "Commodity", y = "Share of global BF-NEE" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](04_commodity_drivers_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Commodity trajectories ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} top_overall <- commodity_global %>% group_by(commodity) %>% summarise( total_bfnee_km2 = sum(bfnee_km2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop" ) %>% slice_max(total_bfnee_km2, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>% pull(commodity) ggplot( commodity_global %>% filter(commodity %in% top_overall), aes( x = year, y = bfnee_km2, group = commodity, linetype = commodity ) ) + geom_line() + geom_point() + scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) + labs( title = "BF-NEE trajectories for top commodities", subtitle = "Top 10 commodities by total BF-NEE across all periods", x = "Year", y = "BF-NEE (km²)", linetype = "Commodity" ) + theme_minimal() ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](04_commodity_drivers_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.svg){width=672} ::: ::: # Diagnostic table ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} datatable( commodity_global %>% arrange(desc(bfnee_km2)), options = list(pageLength = 25) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: :::
